summary: 3 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Echoes
film.talent: Ashley Walters, Nathalie Emmanuel, Emmett J. Scanlan, Leo Gregory; Director Alex Lanipekun
film.announcement: Ashley Walters, Nathalie Emmanuel, Emmett J. Scanlan and Leo Gregory join Alex Lanipekun's short film.

film.title: Crack'd
film.talent: Lauren McQueen; Director Michael J. Long
film.announcement: Lauren McQueen cast to lead Michael J. Long's British psychological drama.

film.title: The Odyssey
film.announcement: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson cast in The Odyssey; articles detail Zendaya's casting discovery and Pattinson's character comparison to his Twilight role.

tv.title: Paris & Pups
tv.announcement: Paris Hilton's animated series set for UK's Sky Kids.

tv.title: A Pressing Engagement
tv.talent: Rhea Norwood, Corey Mylchreest, Hannah Waddingham, Richard Ayoade, Vivian Oparah, Bessie Carter
tv.announcement: Jilly Cooper Audible Original drama with ensemble cast announced.

tv.title: The Tatas
tv.announcement: Team from 'Made in India: A Titan Story' reunites for 'The Tatas,' a saga about the prominent Indian business family.
